findings.issue: Section labels are non-contiguous — labels run hero / 02 / 03 / 04 / 06 (Screenshots). The §05 Updates Shipped removal was not followed by the renumber. Apex skim will read this as a missing section.
findings.fix: Change line 208 from '06 · Screenshots' to '05 · Screenshots'.

findings.issue: §03 caption claims 'same surface now hosts Trends, Azorte, Yousta and Fashion Factory vendor relationships' — source PDF p.50 only attests UVP being 'live for Shein'; the multi-format hosting claim is unsourced and reads as cross-format Live overclaim.
findings.fix: Either drop the multi-format clause and keep only 'The vendor co-creation platform Shein uses' (source-supported), OR add per-format status tags ('Live · Shein  ·  Build · Trends/Azorte/Yousta/Fashion Factory') with citation. See tone-of-voice §3 cross-channel-overclaim rule.

findings.issue: Audience pill 'Audit &amp; Compliance Teams' is double-encoded — renders in browser as the literal string 'Audit & Compliance Teams' instead of 'Audit & Compliance Teams'. Visible bug in the hero pill row.
findings.fix: Change line 166 from 'Audit &amp; Compliance Teams' to 'Audit & Compliance Teams'.

findings.issue: §04 impact claim 'now extending across formats' has no source — the source PDF only attests Shein DSD launch, not active extension to other formats.
findings.fix: Drop 'now extending across formats' or replace with a dated milestone.

findings.issue: §02 second paragraph repeats the hero subhead nearly verbatim ('DSD turnaround down to 5 days (industry first); negotiation cycles from 2 weeks to 4 days') — reads as filler at apex level.
findings.fix: Drop the bolded sentence in §02 (line 179-180); the hero already asserts these numbers and §03 chips reinforce them.

findings.issue: Section label '02 · What it does for you' uses second-person 'you' against tone-of-voice §2 institutional-voice default.
Screenshot alt and lightbox-meta strings missing a space before trailing '·' separator (e.g., 'Live shipment review· Live cross-team review').
findings.fix: Insert space before '·' in alt and openImpetusLightbox meta args across the 8 cards.

findings.issue: Mega-menu omits 'SwapEasy' and 'TMS' entries that the home page mega-menu carries.
findings.fix: Resync mega-menu block on next chrome sweep.

strengths: Hero positions the lead numbers up front in tone-of-voice register: '5-day turnaround (industry first); negotiation cycles 2 weeks → 4 days' — verifiable, scannable, no inflation.
8 screenshots all return HTTP 200, lightbox open + Esc-close works, captions verbatim from source PDF p.51-56.
§04 What Improved callout faithful to source p.50; bullets unchanged.

Module title 'Design Co-Creation Platform' (with parenthetical 'Unified Vendor Platform') aligns with the simplified naming convention from the brief; reads cleaner than UVP alone for an Apex audience.
Sources block correctly absent (per recent edit); Accenture deck attributions cleanly stripped from prose.
